_meta.note: Supplemental tags for Scion: Dragon Heir gear, Hoard/Lair fiction, and draconic Relics. Merged into tags.json at bundle load. Use `chargenLines` on equipment/birthrights that reference these ids.
_meta.source: Scion_Dragon_(Final_Download).pdf — Birthrights / Flights examples (Hoard, Lair, Guides, Relics, pp. 42–93, 112, 128)

draconicResonance.name: Draconic resonance
draconicResonance.description: Item or ally carries a clear draconic signature—Memory hooks, scale-gleam, or serpent-cold undertone.
draconicResonance.mechanicalEffects: Narrative +1 Enhancement when fiction clearly ties the tag to draconic power; confirm costs with Dragon / SG.

hoardTied.name: Hoard-tied
hoardTied.description: Object’s power waxes when displayed or counted among your hoard; jealous if lent out.
hoardTied.mechanicalEffects: Scene stakes around theft, audit, or seizure; confirm with Dragon Hoard rules.

lairBound.name: Lair-bound
lairBound.description: Strongest when brought inside or near your claimed sanctuary; weaker on the road.
lairBound.mechanicalEffects: Enhancement or Defense bumps only while fiction places you in the lair; SG call.

serpentVenom.name: Serpent venom
serpentVenom.description: Wounds weep, scar, or resist divine healing per story.
serpentVenom.mechanicalEffects: Toxic / lasting Injury tilt; confirm tag points with SG.
serpentVenom.source: Scion_Dragon_(Final_Download).pdf, Serpent common Birthrights (Fang of an Ancient, paraphrase)

midrealmKey.name: Midrealm key
midrealmKey.description: Opens or stabilizes passage to pocket-space lairs or Flight-linked Terra Incognitae.
midrealmKey.mechanicalEffects: Access stunts; confirm with Dragon Lair write-ups.

pawnNetwork.name: Pawn network
pawnNetwork.description: Loose allies, hackers, street crews, or cultists who answer to draconic goals more than law.
pawnNetwork.mechanicalEffects: Follower/Cult leverage per Pandora’s Box; tone per Flight (e.g. Black Hats, Crypt).
